name: Diabetic Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening (margarine), egg, sugar substitute, and butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the buttermilk and mix in the flour, baking soda, grated apple, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, ground cloves, and vanilla.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 7-8 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
From: Jeffrey Dean Date: 11-18-93
